seo.title: About | Open Frontier
seo.description: Open Frontier builds dependable AI systems with strong safety and operational clarity.

hero.title: A research-driven company focused on practical, dependable AI.
hero.subtitle: We build products that combine model capability, transparent constraints, and operational confidence for real teams.

sections.heading: Our principles
paragraphs: We prioritize usefulness under constraints: capabilities must be paired with explicit limits and reliable deployment behavior.
We default to measurable quality. If a feature cannot be evaluated in realistic workflows, it is not ready for broad use.
We optimize for long-term trust by designing products, policies, and operations as one integrated system.

panels.title: Cross-functional by default
panels.body: Researchers, engineers, and deployment specialists share ownership from prototype through production rollout.

panels.title: Safety and product ship together
panels.body: Release plans include both user value milestones and explicit risk controls to avoid last-minute tradeoff debt.

sections.heading: Ready to launch your production domain
sections.text: Run this site locally, share through Cloudflare Tunnel, then cut over to your primary domain after DNS is ready.
